admin_required: ⚠️ Let me invite users, then try again.

auth_empty: ℹ️ No extra users have playback access.
auth_is_admin: ℹ️ Admins already have playback access.

bl_invalid: Only chat IDs and user IDs are supported.

bl_user_notify: You've been blacklisted from using this bot. Please reach out in the support chat for more info.

help_menu: 🎵 𝗪𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝘄𝗼𝘂𝗹𝗱 𝘆𝗼𝘂 𝗹𝗶𝗸𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝗱𝗼? Choose a section below.
help_admins: 🛠 Gʀᴏᴜᴘ Cᴏɴᴛʀᴏʟs /setup check readiness /settings personalize the group /pause · /resume · /skip · /stop /seek 15 move forward 15 seconds
help_auth: 👤 Pʟᴀʏʙᴀᴄᴋ Aᴄᴄᴇss Reply with /auth to let someone control playback. Use /unauth to remove access.
help_blist: Blacklist commands: Blacklisted chats and users cannot use the bot. /blacklist [chat_id|user_id]: Add a chat/user to the blacklist. /unblacklist [chat_id|user_id]: Remove a chat/user from the blacklist
help_lang: 🌐 Lᴀɴɢᴜᴀɢᴇ Use /language and choose from the list.
help_play: 🎵 Pʟᴀʏ Mᴜsɪᴄ /play song or link /vplay song or link for video -f play now · -a force audio · -v force video
help_queue: ☰ Qᴜᴇᴜᴇ Use /queue to view upcoming tracks. Use /loop 2 to repeat the current track.
help_stats: 📊 Sᴛᴀᴛᴜs Use /stats for a compact service overview.
help_sudo: ⚙️ Sudo tools 🤖 Assistants /sessions open manager /addsession add securely /enablesession · /disablesession /restartsession · /removesession 📊 Operations /activevc active calls /broadcast broadcast a replied message /status advanced status /logs application log /setlog choose log group /logger pause or resume logs /restart restart the bot ⚙️ Configuration /config safe runtime settings /setconfig · /resetconfig 👤 Access /addsudo · /rmsudo 🧪 /eval execute a Python snippet
log_not_found: ℹ️ No application log is available yet.
logger_off: ℹ️ Log delivery paused. The configured destination was kept.
logger_no_chat: No log group is configured. Run /setlog in the destination group, or use /setlog -100… first.
logger_usage: Choose whether to deliver activity logs: /{0} on /{0} off
not_playing: ℹ️ Nothing is playing right now.

play_duration_limit: Streams longer than {0} minutes are not allowed to play.
play_queue_full: ℹ️ The queue is full ({0} tracks). Try again after a song finishes.
play_invite_error: I couldn't bring the assistant into this chat. Make sure I can invite users, then try again.
play_peer_error: I couldn't connect the music assistant to this group. Make sure the assistant is not banned, then try again.
play_invite_pending: The music assistant asked to join, but the request is still waiting for approval. Approve it from the group's join requests, then try again.
play_not_found: I couldn't find a playable result. Try a different title or link. If this keeps happening, contact the support chat.

recovery_waiting: ℹ️ Your queue is saved but isn't playing yet. Keep the video chat running and use /resume to continue.
recovery_file_missing: Your queue was restored, but the current file is no longer available. Use /skip or add another track.
recovery_skipped: Skipped the unavailable saved track. Use /resume when you're ready to continue.
restarted: ✅ Restart requested. The bot should be back in a few seconds.

session_usage: Use /session <slot|@username|user ID>. Run /sessions to see available slots.
session_not_found: 🔎 No assistant matches that slot, username, or user ID.
session_not_allowed: 🔒 This dashboard is restricted to sudo users.
session_private_only: For safety, add session strings only in a private chat with me.
addsession_usage: Send /addsession <session string> here in private. The command containing the secret will be deleted immediately.
session_add_prompt: 🔑 Aᴅᴅ Aɴ Assɪsᴛᴀɴᴛ Reply with the session string. Your reply will be removed immediately.
session_phone_prompt: 📱 Pʜᴏɴᴇ Nᴜᴍʙᴇʀ Reply with the number in international format. Example: +959… Use /cancel to stop.
session_phone_invalid: ⚠️ That phone number doesn't look complete. Include the country code and try again.
session_code_prompt: 📩 Cʜᴇᴄᴋ Tᴇʟᴇɢʀᴀᴍ Reply with the sign-in code sent for {0}. Spaces are fine.
